_publications._publicationTitle: Quantitative MRI of dorsal root ganglion alterations in neurofibromatosis type 1 patients with or without pain.

_contextSnippet: The inter-rater intraclass correlation coefficient (two-way, agreement) was 0.94 (95% confidence interval 0.87–0.97) for DRG volume, 0.70 (0.60–0.78) for DRG T2, and 0.98 (0.94–0.99) for DRG PD
details: Achieved very good inter-rater reliability for DRG volume (ICC = 0.94, 95% CI 0.87-0.97) and excellent reliability for DRG PD (ICC = 0.98, 95% CI 0.94-0.99) in manual segmentation
